title: Rust lichen-schc: fragmentation sender + receiver (RFC 8724 §8)
description: Implement FragmentSender (tile/FCN schedule, CRC32 MIC) and FragmentReceiver (bitmap reassembly) in no_std Rust, matching Python fragment.py/reassembly.py.
close_reason: Implemented in Rust: codec.rs real compress/decompress (rules 0-4, all 5 vectors pass), fragment.rs FragmentSender+Receiver (CRC32 MIC, window/FCN schedule, 9 tests pass)
